payload.title: Highlight card after remote (SSE) move
payload.description: When a card's status changes via SSE (another agent/CLI/client), briefly highlight the card so the user notices the change. Don't highlight on local drag-and-drop since the user already initiated that. Implementation: add a 'just-moved' class to the moved card after scheduleRefresh re-renders; CSS fades a colored glow/outline in then out over ~2s.
